task_completion.description: Verify the creation of a Robot node with a Box-shaped body and boundingObject.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the Webots Scene Tree panel. There should be a 'Robot' node. Expanded, it must contain a 'Shape' with 'Box' geometry and a 'boundingObject' also set to 'Box'.

task_completion.description: Verify the robot's mass is set to 0.5 kg.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the 'Physics' node under the main 'Robot' node in the Scene Tree or Field Editor. The 'mass' field must be set to exactly 0.5.

task_completion.description: Verify the creation of two wheels configured as HingeJoints with Cylinder endpoints and Physics.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the Scene Tree. There should be two 'HingeJoint' nodes under the Robot. Inside each HingeJoint's 'endPoint', there must be a 'Solid' node containing a 'Cylinder' shape, a 'boundingObject', and a 'Physics' node.

task_completion.description: Verify the motors are correctly named 'left_motor' and 'right_motor'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look inside the 'device' field of the 'HingeJoint' nodes in the Scene Tree or Field Editor. There must be 'RotationalMotor' nodes with their 'name' fields explicitly set to 'left_motor' and 'right_motor'.

task_completion.description: Verify a DistanceSensor named 'front_sensor' is added as a child of the robot.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the Scene Tree under the 'Robot' node's children. There must be a 'DistanceSensor' node with its 'name' field set to 'front_sensor'.

task_completion.description: Verify the WorldInfo.basicTimeStep is 32 or less.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the 'WorldInfo' node at the top of the Scene Tree. In the Field Editor, the 'basicTimeStep' value must be 32 or a smaller number.

task_completion.description: Verify the world is saved to the correct path.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the Webots application title bar or a terminal/file explorer window. The current world file should be named 'my_robot.wbt' and located in '/home/ga/Desktop/'.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the Webots GUI to build the robot.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show interaction with the Webots application interface (Scene Tree, Field Editor, 3D view) rather than just writing a .wbt text file in a code editor.

integrity.description: Verify the agent actually created the nodes from scratch.
integrity.visual_evidence: The Scene Tree should show the standard default Webots node structure for newly added nodes, rather than importing a pre-existing complex robot model like an e-puck or TurtleBot.

integrity.description: Verify the agent did not just copy-paste the expected output file directly via terminal.
integrity.visual_evidence: There should be a sequence of screenshots showing the progressive construction of the robot in the Webots GUI, not just a single terminal command creating the final .wbt file.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Expected output path: /home/ga/Desktop/my_robot.wbt. Expected robot mass: 0.5 kg. Expected left motor name: 'left_motor'. Expected right motor name: 'right_motor'. Expected sensor name: 'front_sensor'.
